The Chtnsse,Communist delegation to the second Congress of the World Federation of Democratic Women (dFDW)**, which took place in Budapest, Hungary, from 1 December to 6 December 1948, consisted of the following 12 women;  Delegation Chairman TSAI Chang, ClANG Chin-chiu, 'TING Ling, LU Tsui, OU Meng-chush, TANG tuei-fen, HAN Chi-min, LI Gen-i, NU Lan, LI Lan-ting, W(J" Ching, and CHIANG fisin.  The delegation arrived in Budapest in three groups in November 1948.  During the meetings, TSAI Chsrtg reported on the development of the democratic woment s movement in Asia and Africa.
